inputs.label: Shift Length
inputs.businessContext: Duration of a single work shift in hours.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of a single work shift in hours.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir iş vardiyasının saat cinsinden süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dauer einer einzelnen Arbeitsschicht in Stunden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée d'un seul poste de travail en heures.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración de un solo turno de trabajo en horas.

inputs.label: Consecutive Shifts
inputs.businessContext: Number of consecutive work days without a day off.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of consecutive work days without a day off.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir gün izinsiz ardışık çalışma günü sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der aufeinanderfolgenden Arbeitstage ohne freien Tag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours de travail consécutifs sans jour de repos.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de días laborables consecutivos sin día libre.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد أيام العمل المتتالية بدون يوم عطلة.

inputs.label: Rest Between Shifts
inputs.businessContext: Average rest time between end of one shift and start of next.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average rest time between end of one shift and start of next.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir vardiyanın bitişi ile diğerinin başlangıcı arasındaki ortalama dinlenme süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Ruhezeit zwischen Ende einer Schicht und Beginn der nächsten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de repos moyen entre la fin d'un poste et le début du suivant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo de descanso promedio entre el final de un turno y el inicio del siguiente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط وقت الراحة بين نهاية الوردية وبداية الوردية التالية.

inputs.label: Noise Level
inputs.businessContext: Average workplace noise exposure in decibels.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average workplace noise exposure in decibels.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Desibel cinsinden ortalama iş yeri gürültü maruziyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Lärmbelastung am Arbeitsplatz in Dezibel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Exposition moyenne au bruit sur le lieu de travail en décibels.
businessContext_i18n.es: Exposición promedio al ruido en el lugar de trabajo en decibelios.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط التعرض للضوضاء في مكان العمل بالديسيبل.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Température du lieu de travail en degrés Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura del lugar de trabajo en grados Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة مكان العمل بالدرجة المئوية.

inputs.label: Workload Factor
inputs.businessContext: Physical and mental workload intensity factor (1.0 = normal, >1.0 = high).

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical and mental workload intensity factor (1.0 = normal, >1.0 = high).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiziksel ve zihinsel iş yükü yoğunluk faktörü (1.0 = normal, >1.0 = yüksek).
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor für körperliche und geistige Arbeitsintensität (1,0 = normal, >1,0 = hoch).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'intensité de la charge physique et mentale (1,0 = normal, >1,0 = élevé).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de intensidad de carga física y mental (1.0 = normal, >1.0 = alta).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل شدة عبء العمل البدني والعقلي (1.0 = عادي، >1.0 = مرتفع).

breakdown.label: Shift Contribution
breakdown.description: Contribution from shift length and workload relative to rest.

breakdown.label: Environment Contribution
breakdown.description: Contribution from noise and temperature stressors.

breakdown.label: Cumulative Contribution
breakdown.description: Contribution from consecutive work days accumulation.
